description_long: This object is a rectangular, upright self-service payment kiosk or terminal, predominantly teal in color with a robust, metallic exterior. The front face features a large transparent window, likely for displaying products or transaction information, and several interactive components including a coin slot, a payment interface, and a dispensing area. Japanese text and branding are visible on the front and side panels, indicating its use in a public or urban setting, possibly for ticketing or vending. The sides are plain with minimal features, while the back is solid with a small access panel and a label. The kiosk stands on a sturdy base, slightly protruding at the bottom for stability. Its overall design is functional and secure, suitable for unattended operation in high-traffic areas.
description: A teal, upright self-service payment kiosk with a transparent front window, payment interfaces, and Japanese branding, designed for public urban use.
description_view_0: The left side of the kiosk, showing a plain teal panel with a small circular feature and a label near the bottom.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying the transparent window, payment slot, coin slot, dispensing area, and visible Japanese text and branding.
description_view_2: The right side, mostly plain teal with some Japanese text near the bottom and no major interactive features.
description_view_3: The rear view, featuring a solid teal panel with a small access panel and a label, no interactive components.
attribute_display_screen: A large rectangular transparent window on the front, possibly serving as a display area, vertically oriented with a thin bezel and some visible interface elements behind the glass.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot and a payment slot are present on the front, with the coin slot above the dispensing area and the payment slot to the right, both metallic and clearly marked.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Japanese branding and logo are printed on the front and right side panels, medium-sized, in a bold, dark font.
attribute_instructional_signage: Instructional text in Japanese is printed vertically on the front panel next to the payment slot, providing user guidance.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A dispensing slot is located at the lower front, rectangular in shape and easily accessible, likely serving as a receipt or product dispenser.
